articles.source_summary: TSN.ua is a Ukrainian digital news platform and part of the 1+1 Media Group, providing coverage of national and international news, including politics, business, society, and current events. It publishes breaking news, analysis, and multimedia content, serving a broad audience in Ukraine and beyond through its Ukrainian and English-language sections. The outlet is generally associated with a mainstream editorial approach within Ukraine’s media landscape. Launched as part of the TSN (Television News Service) brand, it has grown alongside Ukraine’s digital media sector, becoming one of the country’s widely visited news websites. Its content combines reporting with video and live updates, reflecting its connection to television broadcasting and digital distribution.

Pelepasan ini merupakan bagian dari prosedur akhir misi sebelum wahana tersebut dihancurkan di atmosfer Bumi.

articles.source_summary: RIA Novosti is a Russian state-owned news agency that provides coverage of domestic and international news. It reports on topics such as politics, economy, science, culture, and global affairs, serving a Russian-speaking audience and international readers through multilingual content. The agency operates under the state-owned media group Rossiya Segodnya and is commonly described as pro-government in its editorial orientation. RIA Novosti publishes news articles, analysis, multimedia content, and breaking news updates across digital platforms. Established in 1941 as the Soviet Information Bureau, it has undergone several reorganizations and rebranding over time. In its current form, it continues to function as a major component of Russia’s state media system. The agency plays a significant role in disseminating official perspectives and news coverage while maintaining a broad scope of reporting on international and domestic developments.

articles.source_summary: InfoCatólica is a Spanish-language digital news platform focused on Catholic Church news, theology, and religious commentary. It publishes articles, opinion pieces, and analysis related to doctrinal issues, church leadership, and social topics from a Catholic perspective. The platform operates independently and is generally described as conservative within the context of religious media. Founded in the late 2000s, InfoCatólica has developed a niche audience among readers interested in traditional Catholic viewpoints. Its content includes news reporting, editorial commentary, and contributions from religious writers, contributing to discourse on faith and religious issues.

articles.title: Carpenters in Gaza are recycling used wood found under rubble to rebuild
articles.summary: As Israeli restrictions on entry of goods and commodities into Gaza Strip continue, carpenters have resorted to recycling used wood and pallets to serve a community, stricken by two years of war between Hamas and Israel.

articles.title: Что такое искусственный интеллект (не нейросети) и какие у него есть виды
articles.translated_title: What is artificial intelligence (excluding neural networks), and what are its different types?
articles.summary:
Привет, Хабр! На сегодняшний день большинство из нас пользуется инструментами искусственного интеллекта и иногда могут даже не знать об этом. Но задумывались ли вы, что такое ИИ? Многие знают термин "нейросети" и часто приравнивают его к ИИ, но это не так. Нейросети – это одна из разновидностей ИИ, о которых я расскажу в этой статье.
Прежде чем начать разбираться в том, как работают разные ИИ, и какие они вообще бывают, давайте разберемся, что вообще такое искусственный интеллект. Для начала,...
articles.source_summary: Хабр (Habr) is a Russian-language online platform focused on technology, programming, and the IT industry. It combines elements of a news site, blog network, and community forum, allowing users to publish articles and engage in discussions on topics such as software development, cybersecurity, and startups. The platform is privately operated and is widely recognized as a major hub for the Russian-speaking technology community. Founded in 2006, Habr emerged during the growth of online developer communities and has since expanded to include professional content, company blogs, and educational resources. Its audience includes programmers, engineers, and technology enthusiasts across Russia and other Russian-speaking regions. The platform plays a significant role in sharing knowledge and industry updates within the tech sector.

articles.source_summary: CBS News is an American news division of CBS, a major television network owned by Paramount Global. It provides coverage of national and international news, focusing on politics, business, and public affairs. The outlet serves a global English-speaking audience through television broadcasts and digital platforms. Founded in 1927 as CBS Radio News and later expanding into television, CBS News has become one of the United States’ leading news organizations. It produces news programs, investigative reports, and live coverage of major events. Over time, it has expanded its digital presence, offering streaming services and multimedia content. The organization is widely regarded as mainstream. CBS News plays a significant role in global media, contributing to public discourse and information dissemination across multiple platforms.

articles.title: ¿Fue un ataque planeado? Revelan detalles clave del tirador y víctimas del atentado en Teotihuacán
articles.summary: Un ataque armado en la zona arqueológica de Teotihuacán estremeció a México y al mundo, luego de que un hombre abriera fuego contra turistas desde la Pirámide de la Luna. El saldo fue devastador: dos personas muertas, entre ellas una turista canadiense, y al menos seis heridos de distintas nacionalidades, incluyendo visitantes de Colombia, Rusia y Canadá, además de una menor de edad. Las víctimas quedaron atrapadas en medio del caos, mientras decenas de personas intentaban huir en medio del...

articles.title: Пушкинский музей эвакуировали после сообщения об угрозе безопасности
articles.translated_title: The Pushkin Museum was evacuated following a security threat
articles.summary:
В Государственном музее изобразительных искусств имени А. С. Пушкина в воскресенье произошла эвакуация сотрудников и посетителей из-за поступившей информации об угрозах, сообщили в пресс-службе музея. 
В пресс-службе музея сообщили: «Сегодня в 14:30 в музей поступила информация, содержащая угрозы. В целях безопасности посетителей и сотрудников администрация музея незамедлительно приняла решение о полной эвакуации из всех зданий», передает РИА «Новости».
На месте происшествия работают сотрудники...
articles.source_summary: Взгляд (Vzglyad) is a Russian online news platform that provides coverage of domestic and international politics, economy, and current affairs. Founded in 2005, it operates as a digital-first publication and has established a presence within Russia’s media landscape. The platform publishes news articles, analysis, and opinion pieces, often reflecting perspectives aligned with Russian government viewpoints. Coverage includes geopolitical developments, policy issues, and international relations. Vzglyad is known for its commentary-driven approach and emphasis on strategic and political topics. Its content is primarily analytical and opinion-oriented, contributing to public discourse within the context of Russia’s media environment.

articles.source_summary: The Agriculture and Horticulture Development Board (AHDB) is a statutory levy board in the United Kingdom that supports the agriculture and horticulture sectors. Its website provides information on research, market analysis, industry guidance, and development programs, serving farmers, producers, and stakeholders. The organization works to improve productivity, sustainability, and competitiveness across agricultural industries. It operates as a public body funded through levies collected from industry participants. Established in 2008, it was created by merging several existing sector boards to provide coordinated support for agriculture and horticulture. Over time, it has expanded its research and advisory services, addressing challenges such as environmental sustainability and market changes. Its platform reflects its role in providing data, insights, and support to the agricultural sector.

articles.source_summary: Fox News is a major American cable news network and digital media platform that provides coverage of national and international news, politics, business, and entertainment. Launched in 1996 and owned by Fox Corporation, it is one of the most widely watched news networks in the United States. Fox News is known for its extensive political coverage, including live broadcasts, analysis, and opinion programming. Its website complements television content with breaking news articles, opinion pieces, and multimedia features. The network has a distinct editorial identity often associated with conservative viewpoints, while also delivering general news reporting. Fox News plays a significant role in the U.S. media landscape, influencing public discourse and reaching a broad audience through both broadcast and digital channels.

articles.title: México: Frente frío con LLUVIAS intensas, GRANIZO y riesgo de TORNADOS en más de 20 estados
articles.summary:
El clima en México vuelve a dar un giro inesperado con la llegada del frente frío número 45, que traerá lluvias, vientos fuertes y un descenso de temperaturas en gran parte del país. De acuerdo con el Servicio Meteorológico Nacional, este sistema interactuará con una corriente en chorro subtropical, canales de baja presión y humedad del Pacífico y Golfo de México, provocando precipitaciones en más de 20 estados, incluyendo el Valle de México.

Somos más que economía y finanzas, en El Financiero...

articles.title: “Your State-by-State Guide to the 2026 Supreme Court Elections”
articles.summary:
NEW at Bolts.
The post “Your State-by-State Guide to the 2026 Supreme Court Elections” appeared first on Election Law Blog.
articles.source_summary: Election Law Blog is a U.S.-based legal blog focused on election law, voting rights, and political regulation. It provides commentary, analysis, and updates on court cases, legislation, and academic discussions related to electoral systems, targeting legal professionals, scholars, journalists, and policymakers. The blog is authored by Rick Hasen, a law professor specializing in election law, and operates independently as an academic and commentary platform. Established in 2003, it has become a widely referenced source for developments in U.S. election law and policy. The site publishes frequent posts linking to legal decisions, news articles, and scholarly work. It plays a significant role in informing public debate and academic discourse on voting rights and electoral processes in the United States.

articles.title: پاراگراف اول؛ جنگ و ورود میراث فرهنگی ایران به میدان رقابت سیاسی
articles.translated_title: First paragraph: War and the entry of Iran's cultural heritage into the political arena.
articles.summary: در برنامهٔ «پاراگراف اول»، مهرنوش سروش باستان شناس از شیکاگو و تورج دریایی استاد تاریخ ایران و جهان از کالیفرنیا به مسئله شکاف میان جنگ، جامعه و میراث فرهنگی پرداختند.
articles.source_summary: Radio Farda is a Persian-language radio station and digital news platform providing coverage of Iranian and international news, politics, society, and culture. It operates under the U.S. Agency for Global Media and is affiliated with Radio Free Europe/Radio Liberty, making it a publicly funded international broadcaster. The outlet targets Persian-speaking audiences in Iran and the diaspora, delivering news, analysis, and multimedia content. Launched in 2002, Radio Farda was established to provide alternative sources of information and has developed a strong digital presence alongside radio broadcasting. Its content includes news reporting, interviews, and cultural programming, contributing to access to information for Persian-speaking audiences.
